head.title: Agriturismo Segarelli | Dining in Agriturismo
head.description: Enjoy the simplicity of authentic Tuscan cuisine at Agriturismo Segarelli: traditional Italian breakfasts, fresh produce from our garden, and welcoming spaces to eat and relax immersed in nature.
head.keywords: Segarelli agriturismo apartments, Tuscan agriturismo, vacation in the countryside, dining in agriturismo, local products, Tuscan cuisine, breakfast in agriturismo, gastronomic experiences, countryside relaxation

organization.name: Agriturismo Segarelli
organization.description: Agriturismo Segarelli offers an authentic culinary experience in Tuscany, with traditional breakfasts, fresh produce from our garden, and welcoming spaces immersed in nature.

mangiare.title: Eat
mangiare.description: Eat well, in a place designed for well-being.
mangiare.title1: The simple taste of the Tuscan countryside
mangiare.paragraph1: Breakfast is prepared, upon request, only for agriturismo guests. It is a typical Italian breakfast with milk and coffee (barley and/or cocoa), biscuits, rusks with jam, butter to spread, homemade cake, orange juice and yogurt. In addition, we offer our guests products from our garden, such as potatoes, zucchini, eggplants and other seasonal vegetables and fruits

SezioneGallery.subTitle: Refreshment and relaxation area
SezioneGallery.title: Hut, fireplace and conviviality
description: At Agriturismo Segarelli you will find a characteristic hut and a new canopy, perfect for relaxing outdoors. You can enjoy a coffee, tea, an aperitif or prepare your own food in total freedom, using the fireplace for meat, vegetables or grilled dishes, with the fresh aromas of our garden. A welcoming space to be together and enjoy the moment, without having to go out

activities.description: Guests of the agriturismo can visit many medieval villages, some of which are visible in the distance: Micciano, Libbiano, Pomarance, Montecastelli and Radicondoli. Throughout the summer, almost every Sunday, local village festivals take place here, and historical reenactments are always accompanied by tastings of typical local products. During the spring-summer-autumn period they also organize excursions, trekking and other activities

slides.title: Sleep
slides.text: Spacious, quiet and welcoming spaces. Three apartments, some interconnected, to make you feel truly at home: Acacia, Edera and Gelsomino.

slides.title: Eat
slides.text: An authentic, natural and uncomplicated experience.

slides.title: Play
slides.text: Walk, discover, relax: every corner surprises.

slides.title: Discover
slides.text: Discover medieval villages and don't miss typical events.
